philosophy: Vulture: harvest every trustworthy result from the parent, seal pass-or-honest-boundary, release the raw body, carry priors to the next parent. 120B determines Qwen's starting priors, NOT whether Qwen begins.

campaign_120b.status: RUNNING (do not touch; do not modify its scientific code while alive)
campaign_120b.candidate_set_verified: D0 parent-ref (6) + diagnosis diag_mlp1_only/diag_mlp2_only (4) + D2_tensor_pq (6) + D4_pq_doctor (6) + D6_global_alloc (6) = 28; D1 uniform RVQ sealed in G4 as the untreated control; D3/D5 represented by GPT_OSS_120B_D3_D5_NON_ADMISSION.json (dominated by G1/G3 evidence)
campaign_120b.crash_history: 3 memory-pressure kills healed by the byte-budget cache (HAWKING_CACHE_MAX_GB=48/FLOOR=12/RESERVE=40); stable since

binding_amendments_applied_this_session.no_refinement: even on Outcome A, seal immediately (NO lower-rate refinement); NARROW_RATE_REFINEMENT removed from the pipeline
binding_amendments_applied_this_session.no_further_120b_compute: the current campaign is the FINAL permitted 120B compute; no new 120B controller, no reopened search
binding_amendments_applied_this_session.result_does_not_block_qwen: pass OR honest boundary both proceed to Qwen; the result sets priors, not the go decision
binding_amendments_applied_this_session.qwen_full_disk_resident: preferred mode FULL_DISK_RESIDENT_SOURCE - download ALL 118 official shards, keep them all local for the Qwen campaign; execution stays bounded (mmap, range reads, one expert window, PressureAwareCache, RAM floor 12GB, swap guard)
binding_amendments_applied_this_session.two_lanes: after 120B final: Lane A (Vulture harvest + prior updates) and Lane B (release 120B body + full Qwen download) run concurrently; Qwen engineering continues during download

git.note: merge to authoritative main happens at conclusion seal (guarded)

supervisors.overnight_handoff: com.hawking.overnight.handoff LIVE, state WAIT_120B_FINAL, launchd 60s tick, survives reboot; auto-resumes a crashed campaign; being amended for no-refinement + full-download + Vulture harvest lane
supervisors.telegram: per-row card + ETA + fault + completion via 0600 creds file fallback

qwen_full_download_math.fits_full_disk_after_120b_release: yes: 575 - 438 = ~137 GiB free after; >= 100 GiB preferred margin AND >= 40 GiB hard reserve -> FULL_DISK_RESIDENT admitted
qwen_full_download_math.one_copy: local_dir only, no HF cache duplicate; resumable + per-shard verified
qwen_full_download_math.ram_note: 235B never fits in 96 GB RAM; full-disk means all shards on DISK, compute streams per-expert

giants_disk_reality.insight: disk size is precision-driven, not param count: 397B bf16 (751) > 685B fp8 (642) > 1T int4 (554)

rollback: git reset --hard 514212c9; kill 42390 stops the campaign; no source mutated; Qwen metadata only. Deletion of the 7 gpt-oss shards happens only after 15/15 release gates incl Vulture-harvest-sealed.
